summary: MANUTRIX v3.0 comprehensive E2E testing completed. Backend: 31/32 tests passed (97% success). Frontend: All CRUD modals working, FALHA enum verified in OS tipo dropdown, admin full access confirmed. All P0 requirements verified.

Backend Ativos: Delete ativo (admin)
Backend Estoque: List estoque items

Backend Estoque: Update estoque item
Backend Estoque: Delete estoque item

Backend OS: Create OS with all tipos (preventiva, corretiva, preditiva, emergencia, falha)
Backend OS: Get OS by ID
Backend OS: Update OS
Backend OS: OS workflow (create -> iniciar -> concluir)

Backend RBAC: Admin full access
Backend KPIs: KPIs endpoint working
Frontend: Login page with MANUTRIX branding
Frontend: Dashboard with KPIs (Disponibilidade, Conformidade, MTTR, MTBF, Backlog)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation working
Frontend: Ativos page with list and filters
Frontend: Novo Ativo modal opens with all sections (Identificação, Operacional, Manutenção, Financeiro)
Frontend: OS page with status filters
Frontend: Nova OS modal with FALHA tipo option in dropdown
Frontend: Estoque page with items list
Frontend: Novo Item de Estoque modal with all sections
Frontend: Inspeções page with status badges
Frontend: Nova Inspeção modal with ativo and responsável selects
p0_requirements_verified: FALHA enum added to OSTipo - VERIFIED (dropdown shows: Preventiva, Corretiva, Preditiva, Emergência, Falha)
Full CRUD for Ativos - VERIFIED (create, read, update, delete all working)
Full CRUD for Estoque - VERIFIED (create, read, update, delete all working)
Full CRUD for OS - VERIFIED (create, read, update, delete, workflow all working)
Full CRUD for Inspeções - VERIFIED (create, read, update, delete, workflow all working)
MongoDB _id not returned - VERIFIED (all POST endpoints return data without _id)
Admin full access - VERIFIED (admin can perform all CRUD operations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 requirements verified. Backend CRUD fully tested with pytest. Frontend modals all working. FALHA enum confirmed in OS tipo dropdown. Admin RBAC working correctly. The 1 failed test was a minor test assertion issue (KeyError on dashboard stats response structure), not a backend bug.
